content.problemStatement:
Chef Two and Chef Ten are playing a game with a number XXX. In one turn, they can multiply XXX by 222. The goal of the game is to make XXX divisible by 101010.

Help the Chefs find the smallest number of turns necessary to win the game (it may be possible to win in zero turns) or determine that it is impossible.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains a single integer denoting the initial value of XXX.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer — the minimum required number of turns or −1-1−1 if there is no way to win the game.
